---
title: "Current Status"
subtitle: "Where the three decisions stand right now — computed from the evidence register"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Start Here <span class="sep">›</span> Current Status
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This page is the live dashboard of the whole project.** It shows the confidence state of each
decision and the current strength of every claim.
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-grade-c no-dot">v0.1 · Hypothesis stage</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Inspect the evidence](../evidence/claims-confidence.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

## The three decisions

| Decision | Current state | Confidence | Gate to advance |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Market Entry](../decisions/market-entry.qmd) | Illustrative ranking only | <span class="chip chip-grade-c">C</span> | Discovery / pilot evidence for the top segments |
| [Positioning](../decisions/positioning.qmd) | Framing scored, untested on buyers | <span class="chip chip-grade-c">C</span> | Message-testing results |
| [GTM Evidence Gate](../decisions/gtm-evidence-gate.qmd) | Gate defined; not met | <span class="chip chip-grade-d">D</span> | All three claims at grade B + willingness-to-pay evidence |

## Live evidence strength by claim

The table below is computed directly from the [evidence register](../evidence/evidence-register.qmd)
each time the site is rendered. **Strength** is the net supporting weight (supporting minus refuting,
each discounted by source bias). Proposal-only claims correctly land at *weak / none*.

```{python}
#| label: status
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib
_root = pathlib.Path.cwd()
while _root != _root.parent and not (_root / "src").is_dir():
    _root = _root.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root))

from src.utils import load_sample
from src.evidence import summarise_evidence_by_claim
from IPython.display import HTML

register = load_sample("evidence_register.csv")
summary = summarise_evidence_by_claim(register)

n_items = len(register)
n_claims = summary["claim_id"].nunique()
n_proposal = int((register["source_type"] == "proposal").sum())

def metric(label, value, sub=""):
    sub_html = f'<div class="metric-sub">{sub}</div>' if sub else ""
    return (f'<div class="metric"><div class="metric-label">{label}</div>'
            f'<div class="metric-value">{value}</div>{sub_html}</div>')

HTML(
    '<div class="metric-row">'
    + metric("Evidence items", n_items, "in the register")
    + metric("Claims tracked", n_claims, "under active enquiry")
    + metric("Proposal-sourced", f"{n_proposal}", "grade-D items (hypothesis only)")
    + metric("Validated claims", "0", "grade A — none yet, by design")
    + "</div>"
)
```

```{python}
#| label: claim-table
#| echo: false
summary
```

## The central thesis

The proposal's claim that the CRM is the foundation for AI readiness (**H-CRM-AI**) remains a
hypothesis (grade D → C). The planned pilot (`EV-010`) is the pivotal next experiment — see
[AI Readiness](../decisions/positioning.qmd) context in the working paper's
[AI Readiness chapter](../working-paper/06-ai-readiness.qmd).

## Immediate next steps

1. Run the AI-readiness pilot (`EV-010`) and record outcomes.
2. Run discovery calls for the top two segments and a message-test for positioning.
3. Re-run the dashboards and this page; let the numbers move as real evidence replaces synthetic
   inputs.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
Nothing on this page is a recommendation. It is a status read. A decision only becomes a
recommendation when its evidence clears **grade B** — see the individual
[decision pages](../decisions/index.qmd).
:::
